heading: Extraterritorial jurisdiction
label: 3124 Extraterritorial jurisdiction
text: There is jurisdiction over an offense under committed outside the United States if the individual committing the offense is a citizen of the United States or an alien lawfully admitted to the United States for permanent residence (as defined in ).section 3121 of this titlesection 1101(a)(20) of title 8
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 424 of this title
